city.trust.heading: How we keep this fresh
city.trust.curated.title: Editor curated.
city.trust.curated.text: Every listing starts from a public organizer page; the source link is on each detail page.
city.trust.freshness.title: Freshness chip.
city.trust.freshness.text: Green ≤30 days, neutral ≤90 days, amber over 90 days ("Needs update").
city.trust.reports.title: Parent reports & organizer claims.
city.trust.reports.text: Anyone can suggest an update, confirm a listing is still running, or report it closed — straight from the detail page.
city.trust.closed.title: Closed listings disappear.
city.trust.closed.text: Once a closure is confirmed, the listing is removed from this page on the next data update.

activity.cta.heading: Help keep this accurate
activity.cta.text: Found a change? Confirmed details? Let parents in your area benefit.
activity.calendar.none: This activity needs a day and start time before calendar export.
activity.closedBanner: This activity was reported closed. Please verify before going.
activity.trust.heading: Why you can trust this listing
activity.trust.note: Spotted a change? Send it for review so the listing can be checked and refreshed.
activity.plan.heading: Before you go
activity.checklist.heading: Parent checklist
activity.checklist.book: Book or confirm spaces before you go.
activity.checklist.confirm: Confirm the latest time and availability before setting off.
activity.checklist.weather: Check the weather and bring suitable outdoor clothing.
activity.checklist.indoor: Good backup when the weather is not playing along.
activity.checklist.mixed: Check whether this session runs indoors, outdoors, or both.
activity.checklist.parentRequired: Plan for a parent or caregiver to stay and participate.
activity.checklist.parentOptional: Ask whether parents wait, watch, or can leave during the session.
activity.checklist.trial: Ask about trial-session rules before committing.
activity.checklist.trialUnknown: Ask whether a trial or first taster session is possible.
